results.name: Adversarial Robustness Multi-Agent Frontiers 2026
results.rationale: Shares adversarial multi-agent framing only; no Bökh wrestling, 3-touch fall, 9-rank ladder, or eagle-dance ritual mechanisms.

results.name: Adversarial Preference Learning ACL 2025
results.rationale: Preference learning is orthogonal to coevolution tournament with 3-touch fall criterion and rank ladder.

results.name: REINFORCE Adversarial Distributional Semantic
results.rationale: Distributional semantic attack distinct from open-weight attacker-defender with technique-cunning bonus and ritual soft-prompt.

results.name: Multimodal LM Agent Robustness
results.rationale: Multimodal robustness lacks no-weight-class coevolution, 9-rank ladder, and eagle-dance pre/post ritual elements.

results.name: LLM Adaptive Attacks ICLR 2025
results.rationale: Adaptive attacks are single-sided; no coevolution tournament, title-ladder, or 3-touch fall composite criterion.

results.name: Adaptive Attacks Iterative ICLR 2025
results.rationale: Iterative adaptive attack distinct from symmetric attacker-defender with technique-cunning multi-step bonus and ritual.

results.name: LLM Universal Transferable Attacks
results.rationale: Universal transferable attacks do not implement Naadam-style tournament, 9-rank ladder, or devekh ritual.

results.name: Active Attacks Adaptive Environments 2509.21947
results.rationale: Active attacks in adaptive environments lack 3-touch fall criterion, arslan-zaan-garid-avraga ladder, and eagle-dance soft-prompt ritual.

decision_rationale: All 8 results fall below every threshold. Distinctive Bökh-inspired composite mechanism has no analog in retrieved adversarial attack/robustness literature. NOTE: primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.76-0.90 / func 0.76-0.90 on Active-Attacks + Adversarial-Robustness + REINFORCE + Adaptive-Attacks adjacencies; verdict-level disagreement flagged (Pattern E).
